name: Club One Under
address: Lower Level of the Fitgers Building, 600 E Superior St, Duluth, MN 55802
about: Club One Under offers a unique blend of a neighborhood sports bar and an indoor golf simulator experience, allowing play year-round regardless of weather. The venue is equipped with five state-of-the-art Full Swing simulators and two F1 racing simulators, complemented by a vibrant social atmosphere featuring food, drinks, and events. It is designed to be accessible for all skill levels, from first-timers to seasoned players, with no dress code required.
why_golfers_like_it: 5 Full Swing simulators for realistic and immersive play
No dress code, allowing for a casual and relaxed experience
Vibrant social scene with food and drinks, ideal for groups
Year-round indoor play, unaffected by weather

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can bring your own clubs or rent from their premium selection.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers great food and drinks on-site; no information on outside food/drink policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No specific time mentioned, but it's designed for a fun, accessible experience.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Club One Under is kid-friendly, welcoming first-timers to seasoned players and hosting kids' parties.
